A Service by HS108

Lumina.raw

Photo
& Video

Photography Videography Motion

Visuals that stop the scroll. We produce photography and video content that tells your story with precision — edited and ready to publish.

Timeline 1–6 weeks depending on scope
Output Fully edited, platform-ready files

What We Do

Visuals that carry
the full story.

Lumina.raw is the visual production arm of HS108. We shoot, direct, and edit photography and video content for brands that understand that how something looks is part of what it says.

We work across product photography, campaign shoots, brand films, and ongoing content production. Every project starts with a brief that's as clear about emotion and narrative as it is about format and platform.

The name reflects the approach: raw capture handled with precision and intention — not filtered presets and generic stock aesthetics.

Deliverables

Photography

  • Product photography
  • Campaign & editorial photography
  • Brand lifestyle shoots
  • Photo retouching & colour grading
  • Social media image packages

Videography

  • Brand films & documentaries
  • Product videos
  • Campaign & commercial shoots
  • Event & interview coverage
  • Drone & location footage

Post-Production

  • Video editing & colour grade
  • Motion graphics & title design
  • Sound design & music licensing
  • Short-form cuts (Reels, TikTok)
  • Final export in all required formats

How We Work

01

Brief

We align on story, tone, and visual language before anything goes in front of a lens.

02

Pre-Production

Shot lists, location scouting, talent & equipment planning — nothing improvised.

03

Production

The shoot. Controlled, efficient, and directed with a clear creative eye.

04

Edit

Post-production with full colour work, motion graphics, and formats for every platform.

Start a Lumina.raw project.

Tell us what you need to capture — a product launch, a brand film, or an ongoing content system. We'll handle it end to end.

Lumina.raw at a Glance

1–6 Weeks typical engagement
All Formats delivered — social to broadcast

Need the full picture?

Lumina.raw pairs with CX&Identity and WebCanvas for launch-ready brand assets across every medium.
